tasks.title: Implement src/engine/ship-orchestrator.ts
tasks.description: NEW: TypeScript state machine — BRANCH_SETUP → IMPLEMENT → CODE_REVIEW → UAT_REVIEW → PR_CI → DONE. Consumes dispatchToAgent(), assembleDigest(), runGate(). Persists state per FR-008. Circuit breaker per FR-007. Staging validation per FR-016.
